description: Atlas separates the rotating helical H3 regime from older static or shear-only kink obstructions.

open_questions.question: Which finite-device and nonlinear effects are still outside the H3 ideal-MHD closure?

suggested_next_steps.description: Run resistive and nonlinear MHD on RIGID-BELTRAMI-A-like profiles with finite-length boundaries, then compare m=1 growth against the ideal d_i/R -> 0 prediction.
suggested_next_steps.title: Finite-length Atlas profile scan

suggested_next_steps.description: Identify which nonlinear terms are excluded by the H1-H5 theorem and derive a perturbative bound for how large they can be before the closure fails.
suggested_next_steps.title: Nonlinear remainder bound

suggested_next_steps.description: Design magnetic and flow diagnostics that can confirm whether an experimental pinch actually realizes the H3 quartic minimum and sub-Alfvenic rotation profile.
suggested_next_steps.title: Profile-realizability diagnostic

open_questions.question: Which remaining residuals are real contradictions rather than seeded-scope artifacts?

suggested_next_steps.description: Inspect each remaining high-residual edge against the source PDFs and decide whether the edge, regime tag, or claim scope is wrong.
suggested_next_steps.title: Residual edge review

suggested_next_steps.description: If a residual is real, split the broad claim into separate home-regime and cross-regime claims instead of weakening the evidence.
suggested_next_steps.title: Scope split proposal

remaining_tensions.interpretation: AN_01 still predicts poorly at ev_atlas_kink_zero after allowed rewrites.
